round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Acknowledged other agents' findings (Monterey Cypress, fencing) and integrated them to strengthen the primary hypothesis, though the conclusion remained the same.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Explicitly cited Landscape and Regulatory agents' observations to reinforce the botanical evidence, showing good synthesis.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Integrated findings from Landscape and Botanics agents to raise confidence, moving from medium to high.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Reinforced the meta-evidence (fencing/shoulder) with botanical and landscape findings to solidify the conclusion.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence from the four active agents. It noted the absence of the linguistic agent and effectively weighted the corroborating evidence (Monterey Cypress, reddish soil, post-and-wire fencing) to confirm New Zealand. The reasoning was clear, explicit, and accurate.
